headline: A Look At NextEra Energy (NEE) Valuation As Recent Returns Send Mixed Signals
summary: What recent performance says about NextEra Energy (NEE) NextEra Energy (NEE) has drawn attention after mixed recent returns, including about 0.6% over the past day, a 2.8% decline over the past week, and roughly 43% total return over the past year. See our latest analysis for NextEra Energy. At a share price of US$91.83, NextEra Energy shows fading short term momentum, with a weak recent share price return, but its 1 year total shareholder return of 42.6% points to stronger longer term...
